---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new Mercury feature
labels: feature
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what does this feature do? -->

## Problem
<!-- What problem does this solve? What friction does it remove? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should it work? Include CLI command syntax if applicable. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How do we know this is done? List testable outcomes. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Impact Assessment
- **Financial risk:** <!-- Does this touch payments, balances, or keys? -->
- **System impact:** <!-- Does this affect node stability or LND? -->
- **User impact:** <!-- How does the operator experience change? -->
